Delta Conveyance Project

Pre-Construction

Department of Water Resources

Project data

  • Project Info
  • Species 38
  • Milestones 12
  • Construction Activities 27
  • Seasons 4

Project details

A new State Water Project conveyance facility — twin tunnels carrying water beneath the Delta from new North Delta intakes to the southern export facilities. Beacon is the system of record for every environmental commitment, monitoring observation, and compliance report across the project’s components.

Lead agency
Department of Water Resources
Region
Sacramento–San Joaquin Delta
Components
24 tracked · 4 starred
Tracking since
January 2024

Most critical right now

3
  • Observation Nesting-bird resurvey lapsed — ground disturbance not cleared Bouldin Island Launch Shaft Critical Survey expired Mar 24
  • Report Q1 ITP compliance report to CDFW — 2 sections still incomplete Project-wide Critical Due in 2 days · Apr 1
  • Action BIO-14 Exclusion-fencing inspection overdue Intake B — North Delta Urgent 4 days overdue

Components

The components you've starred, with current Tracking, Monitoring, and Reporting status for each.

All 24 components
Bouldin Island Launch Shaft Tunnel launch shaft · Bouldin Island · Pre-Construction
Resurvey lapsed — ground disturbance work blocked
  • Tracking 3 overdue actions
  • Monitoring Resurvey required
  • Reporting Reports current
Intake B — North Delta Screened intake · Sacramento River · Pre-Construction
Fencing inspection overdue — otherwise tracking well
  • Tracking 1 inspection overdue
  • Monitoring 6 obs · 30d
  • Reporting Reports current
Southern Forebay & Pumping Plant Forebay · Byron Tract · Pre-Construction
On schedule across all areas
  • Tracking 22 / 30 actions
  • Monitoring 11 obs · 30d
  • Reporting Q1 section due
Twin Cities Complex Tunnel shaft · Staging · On hold
Paused — revised haul-route agreement pending
  • Tracking Work paused
  • Monitoring 2 obs · 30d
  • Reporting Nothing due
